Log inBook demoBook demo

The world’s most important decisions need reliable AI systems.

Reliable AI has no shortcuts.

Scale works across the AI stack, from the data that trains the models you rely on, to the systems that put them to work. Humans stay in the loop.

Applications

AI systems that actually work.

Most AI deployments in enterprise and government fail. We find the right use case, build the system, and own the outcome.

For Enterprise

Data

The data powering the world's best AI.

The models at the frontier run on Scale data. We source contributors with precision (25% have advanced degrees) and deliver at the bar frontier AI demands.

Proven across every industry.

We set the benchmark for what’s possible with AI

10 years powering the world's biggest AI breakthroughs.

Since 2016, we've been at the forefront; from autonomous vehicles to frontier models solving the world's hardest problems.

The standard every frontier model is measured against.

Our leaderboards run private benchmarks for the most ambitious AI companies to improve model capabilities.

Behind the model. Behind the mission. Behind it all.

Only Scale has the frontier research, world’s best data, and deployment experience to build AI that works in the real world.
